notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer grounds into a double play, third baseman José Ramírez to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. JJ Bleday out at 2nd. Spencer Steer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Elly De La Cruz plunked
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz hit by pitch. Matt McLain to 3rd. Will Benson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Angel Martínez.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo grounds out, second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo walks. Rhys Hoskins to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo triples (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Spencer Steer, deflected by center fielder Dane Myers.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
